impact_levels.P0_act_now: Concrete, repeated, feasible, tied to adoption or trust.
impact_levels.P1_program: Valuable as a coordinated community program or recurring surface.
impact_levels.P2_track_research: Strategically interesting, but not an immediate operating artifact.
impact_levels.P3_acknowledge: Low-certainty, broad, playful, or too speculative to drive work.
